name: think-it-through
description: A lightweight system for extracting, mapping, and advancing complex thought with AI, then projecting it into briefs and plans.

interface.shortDescription: Think freely. The agent keeps the map.
interface.longDescription: Extract, map, and advance complex thought while the agent keeps the conversation coherent, then project it into reusable briefs and plans.
defaultPrompt: $think-it-through:think-it-through Help me unpack a complex subject.
$think-it-through:think-to-brief Turn this conversation into a reusable brief.
$think-it-through:think-to-plan Turn the accepted direction into an execution plan.
